title: strychnos pseudoquina
intro: Strychnos pseudoquina, also known as the Queuina or Strychnine Tree, is a plant species native to the subtropical regions of South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Strychnos pseudoquina include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tea, or as a tincture, which is a concentrated liquid extract typically used in herbal medicine.
